name: File batch request
about: Request or track a sequential file-pack batch
title: "Batch: "
labels: batch, repo-ops
assignees: ""
---

## Batch number and name

Example: `Batch 23 — JavaScript Runtime + Build Utilities`

```txt

```

## Source plan

Link or attach the authoritative batch plan. Do not rely on memory or scattered chat context.

## Required files

Paste the exact repo-relative file list.

```txt

```

## Execution rules

- [ ] Create only the listed files.
- [ ] Preserve repo-relative paths.
- [ ] Do not create lazy stubs.
- [ ] Do not create decorative files with no utility.
- [ ] Do not change `vercel.json`.
- [ ] Do not add deployment workflows.
- [ ] Stop after this batch unless a new batch is explicitly approved.

## Validation expectations

- [ ] JSON parses.
- [ ] JS passes syntax check where applicable.
- [ ] YAML is structurally readable where applicable.
- [ ] Markdown is readable and useful.
- [ ] Public files avoid restricted funding claims.
- [ ] Public files expose no private provider data.
- [ ] Internal files use demo/placeholder data only.

## Notes for Jules / Codex

Add implementation notes, edge cases, or current repo constraints.

```txt

```
